boundary: Lab-test only synthetic scenario pack; not production-ready, customer-ready, migration-ready, or approved for customer data.

sample.custody_expectation: initial receipt custody event with receiving-tech actor and generated lab accession identifier

limits.acceptance: report qualifier if greater than 15 ug/L
report qualifier if greater than 1300 ug/L

qualifiers.meaning: Not detected at or above reporting limit
Estimated value between detection and reporting limits
QC review flag requires reviewer acknowledgement

qc.review_rule: All four analyte results require analyst entry, reviewer lock, and report-release precondition check before COA release.
required_qc_checks: method blank associated with metals batch is ND for Lead and Copper
laboratory control sample recovery is within synthetic 80-120 percent window
field-check duplicate RPD is reviewed when pH or Turbidity differs beyond configured warning threshold
negative_controls: released result mutation denied and audited
unauthorized actor cannot enter or release results

actors.lab-manager: Seeds tenant, catalog, profile, limits, report settings, and QC expectations.
actors.receiving-tech: Receives/accessions synthetic sample and generates label artifact.
actors.analyst: Assigns worksheet and enters results for all analytes.
actors.reviewer: Reviews QC expectations, locks result set, and records review decision.
actors.report-releaser: Generates/releases COA after review and artifact checks pass.
actors.unauthorized-actor: Used only for denied-operation negative controls.

scenarios.purpose: Deterministic seed/reset proof for one synthetic tenant plus one control tenant.
steps: reset local lab-test data store
load tenant and control tenant
load client/contact/project/catalog/profile/limits/qualifiers/report settings exactly once
export state and verify stable fixture ids

scenarios.purpose: One sample lifecycle from receipt through released synthetic COA.
steps: receiving-tech receives OK-SYN-2026-0001 with configured matrix/container/preservation
system generates lab accession id and label artifact
profile expands to pH, Turbidity, Lead, and Copper analysis request lines
analyst assigns worksheet and enters all results with unit/qualifier/limit snapshots
reviewer confirms QC expectations and locks result set
report-releaser generates and releases MVP Synthetic COA v1 with immutable content hash
audit verifier confirms required event order and hash chain

scenarios.purpose: Negative controls required by MVP scope.
steps: deny and audit cross-tenant read/write from Clearline Demo Lab B
deny and audit unauthorized-actor protected mutation
deny and audit illegal sample/result/report workflow jump
deny and audit report release before review/QC/report preconditions
deny and audit mutation of released result or report artifact

scenarios.purpose: Audit and provenance proof for e2e tests.
steps: verify hash chain continuity
verify seed/config, sample intake, label generation, worksheet assignment, result entry, review, COA generation, and release events
verify denied-operation audit events carry actor, tenant, entity, and outcome without storing full sensitive payloads
verify released artifact hash matches report metadata

senaite_mapping.tenant: Lab/portal boundary concept used to scope clients, catalog, samples, and audit events.
senaite_mapping.client: Maps to SENAITE Client organization/account concept.
senaite_mapping.contact: Maps to SENAITE client contact/report recipient role without using real person data.
senaite_mapping.project: Maps to Project/Work Order grouping used during sample intake and reporting.
senaite_mapping.container: Maps to container catalog item for received sample material.
senaite_mapping.preservation: Maps to preservative/preservation requirement associated with container and method profile.
senaite_mapping.analysis_profile: Maps to AnalysisProfile/order template expanded at request time.
senaite_mapping.analysis_service: Maps to AnalysisService/analyte line with method, unit, and reporting metadata snapshot.
senaite_mapping.method: Maps to Method/SOP reference captured as a versioned snapshot for reporting.
senaite_mapping.specification_limit: Maps to client/matrix/analyte reporting or acceptance limits.
senaite_mapping.result_qualifier: Maps to controlled result qualifier vocabulary for ND/J/Q style reporting.
senaite_mapping.qc_review: Maps to minimal QC batch/review expectations; not a full SENAITE QC migration model.
senaite_mapping.report_template: Maps to report template/default metadata needed by a COA renderer and artifact store.
